basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 34 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Notification 2026 has been released under Advt. No. AIIMS Bhopal (Non-Acad.)/2026/06 on the official website of AIIMS Bhopal. A total of 34 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: OBC (Central List) 3 years, SC/ST 5 years, PwBD General 10 years, OBC 13 years, SC/ST 15 years

qualification.education_qualification: A Postgraduate Medical Degree viz. MD/MS/DNB in respective disciplines recognized by NMC/ Institute of National Importance, Valid Registration with NMC/ State Medical Council
qualification.details: A Postgraduate Medical Degree viz. MD/MS/DNB in respective disciplines recognized by NMC/ Institute of National Importance. Valid Registration with NMC/ State Medical Council.

salary_details.details: Rs. 67,700/- (Level-11, Cell No. 01 as per 7th CPC) plus usual allowances including NPA as admissible under rule(s).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bhopal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 34 vacancies announced for the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) positions at AIIMS Bhopal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate Medical Degree such as MD/MS/DNB in the respective disciplines, recognized by NMC/Institute of National Importance, and have valid registration with NMC/State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts is 45 years, with applicable age relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 67,700/- per month, along with usual allowances including NPA as admissible under the rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1500/-. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for the AIIMS Bhopal Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of AIIMS Bhopal on or before the closing date of 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) positions at AIIMS Bhopal are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the 'Important Links' section of this article for easy access.
